project.title: Me sentaron con los meseros en la boda de mi hijo - Parte 5 (final)
project.subtitle: La gala
project.hook: Adelantaron la gala un dia para que yo no llegara.

gala_presidenta.prompt: Same character Bok-ja, same face and short greying permed hair neatly set, plain well-cut charcoal wool dress with long sleeves and a small brooch at the collar, no jewellery, standing upright, both hands holding a worn folder against her chest, calm unshakeable expression, neutral studio background.

sentada_cabecera.prompt: Same character Bok-ja, same face and set hair, same charcoal wool dress and brooch, seated in a high-backed banquet chair, upright posture, both hands resting flat on the table edge in front of her, feet flat on the floor, calm composed expression, neutral studio background.

gala_derrumbe.prompt: Same character Geum-sil, same face, the silver chignon coming loose at one side, same champagne silk dress now creased, standing upright but with her shoulders dropped and both arms hanging at her sides, empty hands, stunned hollow expression, neutral studio background.

traje_gala.prompt: Same character Ji-hoon, same face and short neat black hair, dark navy suit with a plain tie, standing upright, both hands holding a black fountain pen in front of him, resolved steady expression for the first time, neutral studio background.

gala_vestido.prompt: Same character Da-rae, same round gentle face, long dark hair pinned back, simple dark green evening dress with long sleeves, standing upright, both hands holding a small folded paper in front of her, decided frightened expression, neutral studio background.

podio_lado_b.prompt: Same banquet hall, new camera position at the speaking podium from the opposite side, the podium and microphone seen from the head-table side with the round tables and chandeliers beyond, warm golden light, empty set, no people, no text.

podio.prompt: Same banquet hall, new camera position at a low speaking podium set beside the head table looking back across the round tables, the podium edge and a microphone in the foreground, chandeliers above, warm golden light, empty set, no people, no text.

ingredients.generation_prompt: Single old laminated hotel employee ID badge, worn plastic yellowed at the edges, a small faded photograph of a middle-aged East-Asian man in a cook's white jacket in the corner, an embossed hotel crest, no readable text, neutral dark background, extreme detail, realistic photography, no logo.

Single old internal incident report sheet, yellowed paper with faint printed ruled boxes and a red stamp in the corner, one handwritten ink signature at the bottom, a crease across the middle, no readable text, neutral dark background, extreme detail, realistic photography, no logo.

Single thick bound corporate contract lying open on white linen, heavy cream pages, a red seal and a black fountain pen resting on the open page, no readable text, warm light, extreme detail, realistic photography, no logo.

Three old yellowed incident report sheets fanned out side by side on a white tablecloth, each with faint printed ruled boxes, a red corner stamp and one handwritten ink signature at the bottom, no readable text, warm light, extreme detail, realistic photography, no logo.

Single worn brass pocket watch with a scratched glass face and a short chain, lying open on a dark wooden surface, no readable numbers, neutral background, extreme detail, realistic photography, no text, no logo.

music_notes: Piano dramatico que por fin resuelve

tts_export.note: Una sola voz femenina narra todas las escenas, incluidos los dialogos. Fish Audio por escena.
